title: Board
content: Board Prof. Vinod Kumar : Advisor, Former Deputy Director, IIT Roorkee, Former Vice Chancellor, JUIT Prof. Holger Fröhlich : Advisor, Head of AI & Data Science Group, Deputy Head of Department of Bioinformatics, Fraunhofer SCAI, Germany Prof. Yosi Shacham : Advisor, Emeritus in Department of Electrical Engineering, Tel-Aviv University, Tel-Aviv, ISRAEL Prof. Brigitte Vannier : Advisor, 2RCT, Receptors, Regulation and Tumor Cells, University of Poitiers, Poitiers Cedex, FRANCE Prof. Moacyr Comar Junior : Advisor, Instituto de Química, Universidade Federal Uberlândia, Campus Santa Mônica, Uberlândia - MG, BRAZIL Prof. Ahmed Moussa : Advisor, Director of ENSA-Tangier, Abdelmalek Essaadi University, Tangier, MOROCCO Prof. Jata Shankar : HOD, Department of BT & BI Prof. Tiratha Raj Singh : Coordinator, Department of BT and BI Dr. Ragini Raj Singh : Member, Department of PMS Dr. Nishant Jain : Member, Department of ECE Dr. Hari Singh : Member, Department of CSE Dr. Raj Kumar : Member, Department of BT and BI Dr. Shikha Mittal : Member, Department of BT and BI Dr. Sahil Sethi , Assistant Professor, (Visiting): Member, Department of BT and BI CEHTI Industrial advisors: 1.
